ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.5'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Run simple 'R' scripts as command line applications, with automatic robust and convenient support for command line arguments. This package provides 'Rapp', an alternative 'R' front-end similar to 'Rscript', that enables this.

Run simple 'R' scripts as command line applications, with automatic robust and convenient support for command line arguments. This package provides 'Rapp', an alternative 'R' front-end similar to 'Rscript', that enables this.

name: r-rapp
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '0.3.0' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-rapp
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Rapp_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/Rapp/Rapp_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 5af14ce5190d20d9a0dfead9677b0d437a4c2aedf13b63666130404ee1bf77fb

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base {{ r_base }}
    - r-yaml
  run:
    - r-base {{ r_base }}
    - r-yaml

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('Rapp')"                                     # [not win]
    - test -f $PREFIX/etc/conda/activate.d/r-rapp.sh              # [not win]
    - test -f $PREFIX/etc/conda/deactivate.d/r-rapp.sh            # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('Rapp')\""                            # [win]
    - if not exist %PREFIX%\etc\conda\activate.d\r-rapp.bat exit 1    # [win]
    - if not exist %PREFIX%\etc\conda\deactivate.d\r-rapp.bat exit 1  # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/r-lib/Rapp
  license: MIT
  summary: Run simple 'R' scripts as command line applications, with automatic robust and convenient
    support for command line arguments. This package provides 'Rapp', an alternative
    'R' front-end similar to 'Rscript', that enables this.
  license_family: MIT
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/MIT'
    - LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
    - j-andrews7

# Package: Rapp
# Title: Easily Build Command Line Applications
# Version: 0.3.0
# Authors@R: person("Tomasz", "Kalinowski", role = c("aut", "cre"), email = "tomasz@posit.co")
# Description: Run simple 'R' scripts as command line applications, with automatic robust and convenient support for command line arguments. This package provides 'Rapp', an alternative 'R' front-end similar to 'Rscript', that enables this.
# License: MIT + file LICENSE
# URL: https://github.com/r-lib/Rapp
# BugReports: https://github.com/r-lib/Rapp/issues
# Encoding: UTF-8
# RoxygenNote: 7.3.3
# Suggests: testthat (>= 3.0.0), withr
# Config/testthat/edition: 3
# Config/testthat/parallel: true
# Config/testthat/start-first: help-snapshots, basics
# Imports: yaml
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Packaged: 2025-12-14 18:49:20 UTC; tomasz
# Author: Tomasz Kalinowski [aut, cre]
# Maintainer: Tomasz Kalinowski <tomasz@posit.co>
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2025-12-14 19:00:02 UTC
